C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\NotGate.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\NotGate.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\NotGate.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\NotGate.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o C:\Users\PERSONAL\Documents\SystemC\Practice\NotGate\NotGate.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libNotGate.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\NotGate.dir\linkLibs.rsp
